mapper.select: SELECT comment_no AS commentNo, review_no AS reviewNo, user_id AS userId, content, like_cnt AS likeCnt, parent_no AS parentNo, is_deleted AS isDeleted, DATE_FORMAT(reg_date, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS regDate, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment_like cl WHERE cl.comment_no = c.comment_no AND cl.user_id = #{userId}) AS isLiked FROM comment c WHERE review_no = #{reviewNo} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY CASE WHEN parent_no IS NULL THEN comment_no ELSE parent_no END ASC, CASE WHEN parent_no IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END ASC, reg_date ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comment ( review_no, user_id, content, reg_date, is_deleted, like_cnt, parent_no ) VALUES ( #{reviewNo}, #{userId}, #{content}, NOW(), 0, 0, #{parentNo} )
mapper.select: SELECT comment_no AS commentNo, post_no AS postNo, user_id AS userId, content, like_cnt AS likeCnt, parent_no AS parentNo, is_deleted AS isDeleted, DATE_FORMAT(reg_date, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') AS regDate, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment_like cl WHERE cl.comment_no = c.comment_no AND cl.user_id = #{userId}) AS isLiked FROM comment c WHERE post_no = #{postNo} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY CASE WHEN parent_no IS NULL THEN comment_no ELSE parent_no END ASC, CASE WHEN parent_no IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE 1 END ASC, reg_date ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comment ( post_no, user_id, content, reg_date, is_deleted, like_cnt, parent_no ) VALUES ( #{postNo}, #{userId}, #{content}, NOW(), 0, 0, #{parentNo} )
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM comment_like WHERE comment_no = #{commentNo} AND user_id = #{userId}
